channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mattress and sofa flytipped in alleyway on Hilldrop Road, 16th March
item.description:
There is a grey sofa and 2 mattresses, one double, one single flytipped in alleyway behind houses 8 and 10 Hilldrop Road. The items are totally blocking the alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladwell Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes in the road near the junction with Portland Road, 16th March
item.description:
These pot holes have been here for some time and are slowly getting worse. When turning left into Portland Road the wheel of a car can get into the pot hole which may cause damage to the wheel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Garden Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mirror dumped on the pavement, 16th March
item.description:
A large mirror has been dumped on the pavement outside 66 The Limes Avenue. This is dangerous and needs clearing asap.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Limes Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa cushion, 16th March
item.description:
It has been here for a week, your contractors missed it today as someone has dropped it up against the fence of Number 19.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salisbury Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Kent Road, 16th March
item.description:
Boxes and other matter dumped in Kent Road next to house number 25 seems to be a new dumping ground thx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bournewood Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "Keep Left" bollard is not attached, 16th March
item.description:
It looks to have been hit by a vehicle. It's currently resting off the carriageway, on the central reservation, but if it gets swept into the road it will create a hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Welling High Street, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Green BT box in Bournewood Road, 16th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Green BT box Based behind Bournewood Road sign (next to Gilroy Way) thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bournewood Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 16th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Park, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Sofa, 16th March
item.description:
You sent me a message saying this sofa fly tipping has been resolved. ITS STILL THERE !!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
Rubbish bag dumped on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bloomfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapse of pathway/alleyway, 16th March
item.description:
The pathway (alleyway) concrete path has collapsed down the side of my fence, damaging two fence posts. The damage to the concrete pathway is putting a lot of duress on my fence posts. If a strong wind blows, it could collapse the fence panels held by the broken fence poles, causing harm to the public accessing the pathway. As a temporary fix, I’ve had someone come prop the fence, but it requires urgent attention by the local authority.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watling Street, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned outside 108 Ancona Road with no number plates and smashed back window., 16th March
item.description:
Abandoned car with smashed back window and no number plates

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous lime bike parking, 16th March
item.description:
Dangerous and illegal lime bike parking. It’s just ridiculous that Lime do nothing about this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Newman Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old gazebo frame dumped, 16th March
item.description:
This has been here for weeks Obstructing parking Originally reported to Greenwich fix my street, but they report it's not them as the close, 9-19 lakeside avenue is Peabody / private land

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeside Avenue, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoened cars, 16th March
item.description:
Two cars abandoned. One has been in place for over 2 years
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping of mattresses on Groveway, Stockwell, 16th March
item.description:
Two bed mattresses dumped on the pavement at Groveway at the Stockwell Park Road end. The mattresses have been there for at least a couple of days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groveway, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Access Way, 16th March
item.description:
The conditions of the alleyway/entrance are atrocious and in dire need of street lighting, re-paving In its current state, it is an uneven track made up of smashed bricks, rocks and dirt. (see attached photos) Please also note this track is unlit. Both of these issues together are contributing to a severe tripping hazard for anyone who uses this access road. the track slowly has been developing deep holes, in which deep-water pools when there has been heavy rain. Because of the rain and pooling water, this then creates thick layers of mud. Thus creating a slipping risk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Rowley Avenue, Blendon, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded pool table, 16th March
item.description:
Discarded pool table by woods’ entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped over the weekend, 16th March
item.description:
Old wood and other rubbish dumped on council owned grass verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallhouse Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown grass, 16th March
item.description:
Yet again the grass in beddington road is overgrown, seems st pauls wood hill gets cut and white webbs and this doesnt
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
